creator: kzmizzz@gmail.com
text:
After OS installation,

1. login as as root
2. run sysinstall
3. select 'Configure' -> 'Packages'
5. in 'Choose Installation Media' page, select 'FTP Passive'
6. select a FTP site
7. 'User Confirmation Requested' message box appears.
   'Running multi-user, assume that the network is already configured ?'
8. select [Yes] --> Segmentation fault
